rationale: The citing paper explicitly studies willingness-to-pay effects and proposes anchoring-related mechanisms (e.g., left-digit anchoring), while the cited 2004 paper is a core anchoring/WTP study showing incidental prices shift bids and WTP. Given this clear construct overlap (anchoring and WTP, including incentive-compatible bidding contexts), this is not an obvious incidental mention and merits full relation judgment.
